scripts.dev:backend: node scripts/sync-env.js && cd apps/backend && pnpm run start:dev
scripts.dev:all: node scripts/sync-env.js && concurrently --names "API,FLUTTER" --prefix-colors "blue,green" "cd apps/backend && pnpm run start:dev" "cd apps/mobile && flutter run"
scripts.db:migrate: cd apps/backend && npx prisma migrate dev
scripts.mobile:codegen: cd apps/mobile && dart run build_runner build --delete-conflicting-outputs
